reviews.review_description:
The one environment they have accessible is truly beautiful and serene.   I can't wait for more environments to become available.

I want to suggest an option to "remain in the environment" because sometimes I want to linger (which the voice says we can do, but the app doesn't allow it)

If you're looking for an amazing mindfulness experience, PLEASE give this app a try.  Yes, it is certainly in the early stages, so therefore, not a lot of content, right now.  HOWEVER, I believe you will be captivated, almost immediately, by the existing scenes
I found it underwhelming, I couldn't meditate, was too focused on the environment looking like a 3D game from two decades ago. Maybe if you don't have a refined taste in design you'll find it pretty.

I really love this app and can’t wait to get new content updates! I would be happy to pay for more environments as a DLC. The leaves on the stream are wonderful. Also love customizing the music, day/night, etc. Thank you for creating such a peaceful app.
I love what I've seen so far! A wonderful and calm place. All the customization options are great. The floating leaves are just what I needed. I look forward to see what the future holds 😊
A pretty slightly interactive choose your own meditation dealie.

This whole app is so calming and the places are so beautiful. You can also change so many things like colors, sounds, day or night. I really liked the idea with the leafs. Thank you for made this app, its my new favorite calming app now.

I had middling expectations when I downloaded this, but, wow, what a nice surprise. It's still in the early stages and I'm really looking forward to more of it. The scene that's available is just lovely. I find it incredibly peaceful (thank you for making the water translucent, especially the waterfall!) Even the main menu area and the simpler breathing area are nicely done. All contribute to a sense of peace. Besides the beautiful visuals, I very much enjoy being able to create my own music by raising or lowering the volume of the different instruments on offer. That customization is a neat touch that works very well.

There are some tweaks that need making, but they're not big deals and I expect they'll be fixed in future updates: in the breathing part, the breaths come too fast. I'd be hyperventilating if I followed the prompts. And just a personal preference, but I'd like the breath sparkles during the exhale to be lower on the 'screen.' Feels like they're coming out of my eyes right now. But these are super minor and aren't worth detracting a star from my review.

Overall, a super addition to my meditation library. I see myself using this often alongside Tripp. Can't wait for more portals!

developer_response.body:
Hi! Thank you for such a beautiful review! We truly appreciate your suggestions for the breathing exercise and will be updating it in the near future. Please keep an eye out during the summer as we will release new content and develop more realms! Thank you for joining us on the journey. 
Best of wishes, 
The Levitate Team

reviews.review_description: Very nicely done for what it is.  I can see a lot of people wanting to lie down as they do this.  You can adjust the background effects/music which is handy for creating the perfect environment!  Day and night mode are an option as well. I can't wait to see this app progress.

This app is amazing. The stream meditation is literally the best NLP meditation exercise I have seen in VR. I have paid for apps and got my money back because I didn’t like them as much as this. WELL DONE. And thank you!!!!
